moves.description: Activate the communicative purpose before asking the learner to answer.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Briefly tell the learner what communicative job this answer must do, then invite a natural attempt.

moves.description: Recast the learner's intended meaning into a clearer natural expression.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Keep the learner's meaning, repair one expression issue, and avoid forcing the target sentence.

moves.description: Offer a reusable sentence frame that helps the learner express the intent.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Give one short frame and ask the learner to fill it with their own facts.

moves.description: Reduce speaking anxiety by giving two possible starts.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Offer no more than two short starts and ask the learner to choose one.

moves.description: Train one short phrase chunk before the learner retries the whole intent.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Pick one 3-8 word chunk from nodeInputs.chunks and ask for a short repeat or reuse.

moves.description: Improve tone and pragmatic naturalness without over-correcting.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Point out one tone/naturalness issue and provide one natural alternative.

moves.description: Move mastered intent to a nearby context.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Ask one short transfer question only after mastery or ready_for_transfer.

moves.description: Contrast two close expressions when the learner chooses an unnatural option.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Contrast the learner's wording with a more natural option in one point.

moves.description: Diagnose the main error type and repair misunderstanding or off-topic turns.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Name the main issue simply and redirect to the current communicative task.

moves.description: Acknowledge partial success, recast one phrase, then ask a precise follow-up.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Credit what is correct, repair one missing signal, and ask for one added detail.

moves.description: Increase or simplify difficulty based on mastery and capability state.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Adjust the next task one notch up or down; never add multiple requirements.

moves.description: Adapt support using weakness memory and repeated attempts.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Use weaknessProfile to reduce load and pick one support path.

moves.description: Give one pronunciation or fluency adjustment tied to the current expression.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Use scoring signals to focus on one sound, stress, pause, or rhythm issue.

moves.description: Confirm capability mastery and decide whether to advance or transfer.
moves.runtimeTemplate: Confirm the completed intent briefly; do not ask the learner to repeat the same target.
